prompt: Use the provided image as the base reference for the original character. Create a 'middle school memory photo album' for that character. This is not a concept art book or an official profile; it is a personal photo album left behind by the character from their middle school days. [Concept] Let the viewer naturally feel that 'this character also had these kinds of middle school days.' Value friendship, youth, everyday life, and slightly embarrassing memories. [Album Format] A real physical pocket-style family photo album shown spread open. Three photos on the left page and three on the right, for a total of six horizontal photos. Photos should be depicted as L-size prints inserted into album pockets. Include a comment section in the gutter of the album. Each photo should have a short handwritten comment presumably written by the character at the time, reflecting natural middle school sentiment. [Photo Content] Every photo must represent a different memory, such as pool with friends, sports day, school trip, cultural festival, graduation, club activities. Actively include candid snapshots of daily life, not just commemorative shots. Different seasons and school events should appear. [Character Depiction] Portray the character from the reference as their middle school self. Maintain facial features, hair style, color, eye shape, and personality while making them look slightly younger and less mature. Outfits like uniforms or gym clothes should be chosen naturally based on the scene. [Friends] Include school friends naturally as part of the youth memories. [Atmosphere] Nostalgic, warm, slightly shy, and fun. It should feel like looking at an old album from a shelf at home.
